summary: Comprehensive regression testing completed for critical bug fix - foods with safety_level='avoid' are NEVER recommended. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright testing.
passed_tests: CRITICAL: All 13 avoid foods (Alcohol, Energy Drinks, Raw Fish, etc.) have is_recommended=false
CRITICAL: Avoid foods never recommended without any health conditions
CRITICAL: Avoid foods never recommended WITH anemia condition
CRITICAL: Avoid foods never recommended with ALL health conditions combined
CRITICAL: Alcohol (id:60) specifically verified as never recommended
CRITICAL: Sushi/Raw Fish (id:2) specifically verified as never recommended
CRITICAL: All 13 avoid food IDs verified: 2,3,8,13,16,24,28,34,41,48,60,64,66
Anemia condition recommends iron-rich foods (Leafy Greens, Beef, Legumes, Sardines, Oatmeal)
Anemia condition info returned with iron description
Gestational diabetes recommends low-glycemic foods (Berries, Avocado, Tofu, etc.)
Gestational diabetes flags high-sugar foods (Ice Cream, Dried Fruits, Soda)
High blood pressure recommends potassium-rich, low-sodium foods
High blood pressure flags high-sodium foods (Hard Cheese, Deli Meats, Hot Dogs)
All avoid foods have caution_reasons populated with 'Not recommended during pregnancy'
Trimester 1 info returned correctly (First Trimester, Folate priority)
Trimester 2 info returned correctly (Second Trimester, Calcium priority)
Trimester 3 info returned correctly (Third Trimester, Iron priority)
Postpartum (Trimester 4) info returned correctly
API response structure correct with all required fields (foods, recommendations, counts, disclaimer)
Food items have all personalization fields (is_recommended, should_limit, recommendation_reasons, caution_reasons, health_tags)
Caution count includes all 13+ avoid foods (minimum)
Frontend: Onboarding flow works - age input, trimester selection, health conditions
Frontend: Personalization banner shows trimester info (Second Trimester with nutrients)
Frontend: '13 to limit' badge displays for caution foods
Frontend: Avoid filter shows exactly 13 foods
Frontend: Alcohol detail page shows 'Best Avoided' badge and 'Not recommended during pregnancy' message
Frontend: Food cards display safety level badges correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Critical safety check at line 279 in health_filters.py working correctly - returns early with should_limit=true for avoid foods
FOOD_HEALTH_TAGS correctly mapped with string IDs matching FOOD_DATABASE
NEVER_RECOMMEND_TAGS list prevents recommendation of foods with harmful/raw/unpasteurized/unripe/high-mercury tags
filter_food_for_user() function properly handles safety_level='avoid' before any condition-based recommendations
Frontend correctly calls personalized API with health_conditions and trimester from localStorage user data
test_credentials: No credentials needed - localStorage-based user management
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing FOOD_DATABASE
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: safety_level='avoid' foods are NEVER recommended regardless of health conditions. All 13 avoid foods (Alcohol, Energy Drinks, Sushi, High Mercury Fish, Raw Oysters, Soft Cheese Unpasteurized, Raw Milk, Raw Eggs, Rare Meat, Pate, Unripe Papaya, Raw Sprouts, Unpasteurized Juice) correctly flagged. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_personalized_foods.py can be reused for regression testing. Disclaimer modal needs 'I Understand' click before accessing main app.

features_verified.critical_bug_fix: VERIFIED - avoid foods never get is_recommended=true
features_verified.safety_level_avoid_handling: WORKING - all 13 avoid foods have should_limit=true and is_recommended=false
features_verified.gestational_diabetes_recommendations: WORKING - low-glycemic foods recommended, high-sugar foods limited
features_verified.high_blood_pressure_recommendations: WORKING - potassium-rich foods recommended, high-sodium foods limited
features_verified.trimester_personalization: WORKING - all 4 trimesters return correct info
features_verified.caution_reasons_population: WORKING - avoid foods have 'Not recommended during pregnancy' reason
features_verified.frontend_personalization_display: WORKING - trimester banner, caution count displayed
features_verified.frontend_food_card_badges: WORKING - Best Avoided badge shown for avoid foods
features_verified.frontend_onboarding_flow: WORKING - age, trimester, health conditions selection
